hero.title: Scent is memory
hero.sub: Eight eaux de parfum composed with French and Swiss essences, born in the city of jasmine.

home.ritualBody: Worn quietly. Remembered always. Each LANTANA composition is macerated for weeks, hand-finished, and sealed in Dubai with essences from Grasse and Geneva.
home.newsletterSub: Launches, private previews and the Damascus edit. Never more than once a month.

product.shippingBody: Complimentary gift wrapping. Dispatched within 48 hours from Damascus and Dubai. Returns accepted within 14 days, unopened.
product.reviewThanks: Thank you — your review is awaiting approval.

footer.madeIn: Composed in Damascus · Crafted in Dubai

about.title: The city of jasmine, in a bottle
about.body1: LANTANA was born in Damascus — the oldest continuously inhabited city on earth, where jasmine climbs the courtyard walls and every evening carries a different memory.
about.body2: Our compositions are built from French and Swiss essences, macerated slowly and finished by hand in Dubai. Each bottle carries a fragment of the Levant: rose from the gardens, oud from the old souk, jasmine from the city itself.
about.body3: We believe in fragrances worn quietly — felt before they are noticed, remembered after they are gone.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.body: For orders, press and private commissions.
contactPage.sent: Message received. We reply within one business day.
